deck:
* Asymmetric Half Bridge (AHB) — Imbertson-Mohan / TI SLUP223 / ON-Semi AN-4153
* Vin=4.800000e+01 V, Vo=1.200000e+01 V, Io=2.000000e+00 A, fsw=1.000000e+02 kHz, D=4.500000e-01, n=1.710000e+00, rect=3
* Lm=5.332635e+02 uH, Llk=1.000000e+00 uH, Lo=1.010000e+02 uH, Cb=4.385965e+00 uF, Co=6.250000e+00 uF
* IC: V_Cb=2.640000e+01 V, i_Lm=5.569479e-03 A, i_Lo=2.000000e+00 A, V_Co=1.200000e+01 V

.model SW1 SW VT=2.500000e+00 VH=8.000000e-01 RON=1.000000e-03 ROFF=1.000000e+06
.model DIDEAL D(IS=1.000000e-12 RS=1.000000e-03 BV=1000 IBV=1e-12)

Vdc vin_dc 0 4.800000e+01

Vpwm_Q1 g1 0 PULSE(0 5.000000e+00 0 1.000000e-08 1.000000e-08 4.450000e-06 1.000000e-05)
Vpwm_Q2 g2 0 PULSE(0 5.000000e+00 4.550000e-06 1.000000e-08 1.000000e-08 5.450000e-06 1.000000e-05)

Vq1_sense vin_dc q1_drain 0
S1 q1_drain sw g1 0 SW1
D1 sw vin_dc DIDEAL
Rsnub_Q1 vin_dc sw 1.000000e+03
Csnub_Q1 vin_dc sw 1.000000e-09
S2 sw 0 g2 0 SW1
D2 0 sw DIDEAL
Rsnub_Q2 sw 0 1.000000e+03
Csnub_Q2 sw 0 1.000000e-09

Vcb_sense vin_dc cb_lo 0
C_b cb_lo pri_top 4.385965e-06 IC=2.640000e+01
R_cb_esr pri_top pri_top_esr 1m
L_lk pri_top_esr pri_lk 1.000000e-06
Evab vab 0 sw pri_top 1
Vpri_sense pri_lk pri_dot 0
L_pri pri_dot sw 5.332635e-04 IC=5.569479e-03

L_sec sec_a sec_b 1.823684e-04
K1 L_pri L_sec 9.990000e-01
Vsec_a_sense sec_a sec_a_d 0
Vsec_b_sense sec_b sec_b_d 0
D_r1 sec_a_d out_rect DIDEAL
D_r2 sec_b_d out_rect DIDEAL
D_r3 out_gnd sec_a_d DIDEAL
D_r4 out_gnd sec_b_d DIDEAL
L_o out_rect out_node 1.010000e-04 IC=2.000000e+00
R_lo_dcr out_node out_node_after_dcr 1m
R_co_esr out_node_after_dcr co_top 1m
C_o co_top out_gnd 6.250000e-06 IC=1.200000e+01
R_load co_top out_gnd 6.000000e+00
Vout_sense out_gnd 0 0

Evpri_w vpri_w 0 sw pri_dot 1
Evsec_w vsec_w 0 sec_a sec_b 1
.tran 5.000000e-08 2.401000e-02 2.400000e-02 uic

.save v(vab) v(sw) v(pri_top) v(out_node) v(vin_dc) v(vpri_w) v(vsec_w) i(Vpri_sense) i(Vcb_sense) i(Vsec_a_sense) i(Vsec_b_sense) i(Vout_sense) i(Vdc) i(Vq1_sense)

.options RELTOL=1.000000e-02 ABSTOL=1.000000e-07 VNTOL=1.000000e-04 ITL1=500 ITL4=500
.options METHOD=GEAR TRTOL=7.000000e+00
.nodeset v(co_top)=1.200000e+01 v(pri_top)=2.160000e+01 v(out_rect)=1.270000e+01 v(sec_a_d)=1.270000e+01 v(sec_b_d)=1.270000e+01

.end
